title: Official-source research: NYC GIS Zoning Features + Zoning Tax Lot Database
objective: Discover, document, and verify the best official sources for NYC GIS Zoning Features (zoning district/overlay/special-district geometries) and the NYC Zoning Tax Lot Database, following the M1-T001 evidence standard: verified channels and identifiers, version/release model, fields/units/null semantics, channel discrepancies, PRD 8.2 registry drafts, fixture-pack proposal, no guessed schemas
business_reason: M2 zoning-district/overlay/split-lot intelligence cannot be contracted without verified official zoning geodata sources
inputs: PRD.md section 8.1 (mandatory source families) and 8.2 (registry record fields)

docs/research/pluto-mappluto-2026-07-16.md (M1-T001 accepted research: evidence standard, verification discipline, OQ ledger pattern; DATES OF DATA shows NYC GIS Zoning Features vintage 2026-03-31 as a PLUTO input)

Official starting points: https://www.nyc.gov/content/planning/pages/resources ; https://opendata.cityofnewyork.us/ ; NYC Open Data catalog search for GIS Zoning Features / NYC Zoning Tax Lot Database; ArcGIS DCP_GIS org (verified M1-T001: services5.arcgis.com/GfwWNkhOj9bNBqoJ)
outputs: docs/research/zoning-features-ztldb-2026-07-16.md (findings with per-claim evidence citations and an open-questions ledger; unverified claims marked NEEDS G1 RE-VERIFICATION)
docs/research/source-registry-drafts/zoning-features.json and ztldb.json (all 18 PRD 8.2 fields per record; nulls where unknown)

acceptance_scenarios.input: enumerate all official distribution channels for both products (Open Data/SODA, DCP bulk downloads, ArcGIS services)
acceptance_scenarios.expected: every channel evidenced by a live fetch or directly read official document; dataset identifiers verified live where a SODA resource exists; no channel asserted from memory or search-summary alone

acceptance_scenarios.input: version/release model and update cadence for both products
acceptance_scenarios.expected: verbatim official statements on release cadence and versioning; current version observed live where possible; relationship to PLUTO release cycle (zoning attributes update monthly) documented

acceptance_scenarios.input: fields, units, CRS, null semantics; split-lot representation in ZTLDB
acceptance_scenarios.expected: field inventory from official metadata/dictionary (not from sampled record keys); unknowns entered in an OQ ledger, never guessed; CRS stated with evidence

acceptance_scenarios.input: cross-channel discrepancies (stale attachments, version lag, metadata timestamps)
acceptance_scenarios.expected: discrepancies surfaced with evidence and a recommended PRD section-8 priority order per product
403/timeout behavior recorded honestly as OQ items with the exact URL; nothing promoted to fact without direct verification

risks: nyc.gov bot protection (403) blocked M1-T001 bulk-download page reads; expect the same and ledger it rather than guessing
Multiple similarly-named zoning datasets exist on the portal; identity must be pinned by dataset ID + attribution, not by name
Low-storage: KB-scale fetches only; no shapefile/geodatabase downloads in a research task

progress_log.message: Producer deliverables committed d5c59ac; G1 (data-contract-verifier) dispatched for live re-verification
